# Find Skills

## Purpose
Search and install skills from a repo.

## When to Use
Use when the user wants to browse or install skills.

## Inputs
Repository URLs, skill names, and install flags.

## Behavior
Use the CLI workflow to find and install skills.

## Constraints
This bundle includes executable package metadata and must not be treated as safe text only.

## Response Style
Be direct and operational.

## Example Prompts
- Find skills in a repo.
- Install a skill by name.
